AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Description: 'ZapStop API - FastAPI on Lambda with Aurora Serverless v2'

Globals:
  Function:
    Timeout: 30
    MemorySize: 1024
    Runtime: python3.11
    Architectures:
      - x86_64
    Environment:
      Variables:
        STAGE: !Ref Stage
        REGION: !Ref AWS::Region
        DB_SECRET_NAME: !Ref DatabaseSecret
        REDIS_SECRET_NAME: !Ref RedisSecret
        JWT_SECRET: !Ref JWTSecret
        JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: !Ref JWTRefreshSecret
        DEBUG: !Ref DebugMode

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues: [dev, staging, prod]
    Description: Deployment stage
  
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC ID for the resources
  
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: First private subnet for Aurora
  
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Second private subnet for Aurora
  
  JWTSecret:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: JWT secret key
    Default: your-super-secret-jwt-key-change-in-production
  
  JWTRefreshSecret:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: JWT refresh secret key
    Default: your-super-secret-refresh-key-change-in-production
  
  DebugMode:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Enable debug mode

Resources:
  # Lambda Function
  ZapStopApiFunction:
    Type: AWS::Serverless::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 'zapstop-api-${Stage}'
      CodeUri: backend/
      Handler: lambda_handler.lambda_handler
      Description: ZapStop FastAPI Lambda function
      VpcConfig:
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
        SubnetIds:
          - !Ref PrivateSubnet1Id
          - !Ref PrivateSubnet2Id
      Policies:
        - Version: '2012-10-17'
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
              Resource:
                - !Ref DatabaseSecret
                - !Ref RedisSecret
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - rds-db:connect
              Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:rds-db:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:dbuser:${AuroraCluster}/${DBUsername}'
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - logs:CreateLogGroup
                - logs:CreateLogStream
                - logs:PutLogEvents
              Resource: '*'
      Layers:
        - !Ref PythonDependenciesLayer
      Events:
        ApiGateway:
          Type: HttpApi
          Properties:
            Path: /{proxy+}
            Method: ANY
            Cors:
              AllowMethods: "'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS'"
              AllowHeaders: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              AllowOrigin: "'*'"
        RootApiGateway:
          Type: HttpApi
          Properties:
            Path: /
            Method: ANY
            Cors:
              AllowMethods: "'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS'"
              AllowHeaders: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              AllowOrigin: "'*'"

  # Python Dependencies Layer
  PythonDependenciesLayer:
    Type: AWS::Serverless::LayerVersion
    Properties:
      LayerName: !Sub 'zapstop-dependencies-${Stage}'
      Description: Python dependencies for ZapStop
      ContentUri: backend/
      CompatibleRuntimes:
        - python3.11
      RetentionPolicy: Delete
      Metadata:
        BuildMethod: python3.11

  # Aurora Serverless v2 Cluster
  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Sub 'zapstop-aurora-cluster-${Stage}'
      Engine: aurora-postgresql
      EngineMode: provisioned
      EngineVersion: '15.4'
      DatabaseName: zapstop
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref DatabasePassword
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref AuroraSubnetGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'sun:04:00-sun:05:00'
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DeletionProtection: false
      ServerlessV2ScalingConfiguration:
        MinCapacity: 0.5
        MaxCapacity: 16
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Service
          Value: zapstop

  # Aurora Serverless v2 Instance
  AuroraInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub 'zapstop-aurora-instance-${Stage}'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.serverless
      Engine: aurora-postgresql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Service
          Value: zapstop

  # Security Group for Aurora
  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'zapstop-aurora-sg-${Stage}'

  # Security Group for Lambda
  LambdaSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Lambda functions
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'zapstop-lambda-sg-${Stage}'

  # DB Subnet Group
  AuroraSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Aurora cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1Id
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2Id
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'zapstop-aurora-subnet-group-${Stage}'

  # Secrets Manager for database credentials
  DatabaseSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub 'zapstop/aurora/credentials/${Stage}'
      Description: Database credentials for ZapStop Aurora cluster
      SecretString: !Sub |
        {
          "username": "${DBUsername}",
          "password": "${DatabasePassword}",
          "host": "${AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address}",
          "port": 5432,
          "dbname": "zapstop",
          "sslmode": "require"
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Service
          Value: zapstop

  # Secrets Manager for Redis credentials
  RedisSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub 'zapstop/redis/credentials/${Stage}'
      Description: Redis credentials for ZapStop
      SecretString: !Sub |
        {
          "host": "${RedisCluster.RedisEndpoint.Address}",
          "port": 6379,
          "password": ""
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Service
          Value: zapstop

  # ElastiCache Redis Cluster
  RedisCluster:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupId: !Sub 'zapstop-redis-${Stage}'
      Description: Redis cluster for ZapStop caching
      NodeType: cache.t3.micro
      Port: 6379
      NumCacheClusters: 1
      Engine: redis
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref RedisSubnetGroup
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref RedisSecurityGroup
      AtRestEncryptionEnabled: true
      TransitEncryptionEnabled: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Service
          Value: zapstop

  # Redis Security Group
  RedisSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Redis cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 6379
          ToPort: 6379
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'zapstop-redis-sg-${Stage}'

  # Redis Subnet Group
  RedisSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Subnet group for Redis cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1Id
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2Id

  # Database Password
  DatabasePassword:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub 'zapstop-db-password-${Stage}'
      Description: Database password for ZapStop
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username":"${DBUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: 'password'
        PasswordLength: 32
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\'

  # Database Username
  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: zapstop_user
    Description: Database username

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayUrl:
    Description: API Gateway endpoint URL
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ServerlessHttpApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-api-url'

  AuroraClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora cluster endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-aurora-endpoint'

  AuroraClusterPort:
    Description: Aurora cluster port
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Port
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-aurora-port'

  DatabaseSecretArn:
    Description: Database secret ARN
    Value: !Ref DatabaseSecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-secret-arn'

  RedisEndpoint:
    Description: Redis cluster endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt RedisCluster.RedisEndpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-redis-endpoint'

  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Lambda function name
    Value: !Ref ZapStopApiFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lambda-function'
